title: QS stringify handles nested objects, repeat arrays, and null skipping
prompt: Fix stringifyQuery so it matches qs-style stringify behavior for this benchmark slice: nested objects should use bracket notation, arrays should repeat the same key, null values should be skipped, and scalar values should still be URL encoded.
golden_patch_description: Match qs-style nested object bracket encoding, repeated array keys, null skipping, and scalar URL encoding for the supported input shapes.
instance_notes: Compact qs stringify slice derived from upstream stringify semantics with repeat arrays and null skipping.
